Figure 1: Performance of memory systems using GPT-4.1-mini internally. All confidence intervals use 95% Wilson score binomial intervals.

Figure 2: Performance of StructMem and SimpleMem as a function of their internal model. Mem0 and AMEM follow the same trend, as shown in Appendix C, but we exclude them here for conciseness. Equipping the system with a stronger internal model does not lead to performance gains.
